body_txt: Since the Vomit Discretion Shot is so common, there's nothing better to show off how edgy you are than show the act directly. The grosser, dirtier, and more nauseating , the better. Comes in two, uh, flavors: Often shown from a low angle for added impact. A writer with particular attention to detail will notice that, having thrown up, the wave of the smell of the stuff is liable to make you... keep on at it. See also Vomit Chain Reaction . Related to Rainbow Puke and Waterfall Puke , both of which usually apply to anime. Zombie Puke Attack , by its nature, will involve this. Often used for a Stress Vomit shot. Contrast Vomit Discretion Shot . As this trope requires a creative decision, No Real Life Examples, Please! noreallife
